suite.name: TS-F02-US6

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.name: TC16 เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยบัญชีที่สร้างไว้ใน TC01 ของ US1

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: ทดสอบล็อกอินด้วยบัญชีที่สร้างไว้ใน TC01 ของ US1

test.name: TC17,TC18 เข้าหน้าการเดินทางที่จบแล้วและเขียนรีวิว

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: const evt = new MouseEvent('click', { clientX: x, clientY: y, bubbles: true });
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ขับขี่ปลอดภัย')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ขับขี่ปลอดภัย')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'รถสะอาดน่านั่ง')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'รถสะอาดน่านั่ง')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'คนขับอัธยาศัยดี')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'คนขับอัธยาศัยดี')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ชอบเพลงที่เปิด')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ชอบเพลงที่เปิด')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder='เขียนรีวิวที่นี่']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ขับดีมากครับพี่ รถพี่สุดยอด' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@placeholder='เขียนรีวิวที่นี่']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//textarea[@placeholder='เขียนรีวิวที่นี่']
ขับดีมากครับพี่ รถพี่สุดยอด
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Alert Should Be Present
kw.doc: Verifies that an alert is present and by default, accepts it.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: จำลอง Passenger เข้าหน้าเส้นทางที่จบแล้วเพื่อเขียนรีวิวให้ Driver

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: US-6: ผู้ใช้เขียนรีวิวแต่ใส่ไฟล์ผิดประเภท
